transcript.clean_text: foreign skies for the penultimate day of racing on lovewelter all jerseys more or less spoken for as Pederson underscoring his greatness in green with Victory once again into memco with a gap of two minutes and seven over Enric Mass a user in third place for United Arab Emirates ahead of Mia Angel Lopez but minor places could they possibly change the festival about to draw to a close would do in Madrid but first a day of Mighty racing with huge altitudes to take on at PACE well the greats were assembling themselves for a last push up to The High Ground plenty of climbing with a plateau finish hugs of encouragement being offered up to one of user wearing The Young Riders classification Jersey on behalf of Remco well he's at one age of the aid Spectrum Valverde another the Old Guard handing over to the new you might say nervous day for Remco over Nepal and of course his Quick Step Alpha vinyl team they knew that on such terrain he would face attacks when would they come and how would they materialize we would only know by the end out of the back door they would be climbing rolling terrain leading to the first peak one of three category one tests with a plateau finale well with the terrain looking as it did it was always going to draw a breakaway and we had some very strong turns up there mulberger first with Mark Solaire Rob Stellar thibopino was involved Gina maida others came to join the fun and it swelled to an enormous Breakaway but was too big to succeed was bound to shatter and so it was that pushing off the front went Rob stanard with Mark Solaire Stalin himself well placing the king of the mountains Jersey competition but suddenly thought well maybe maybe I could take some inroads into the polka dot Jersey owned and worn by Richard karapas stanard was collecting points and with so many up for grabs on the final day how would it pan out there bracing that is still Madrid to come but it was the mountains that were characterizing the day and the ability to drive into them well Richard karapas was not about to be unseated I wanted to make an enormous statement two stage wins to his name already in this race was he hunting down another Louis menkes also in determined mood a man who's taken the stage win in this race and with Sergio agita the Colombian champion on his wheel it was a good bridge and a good idea to get over to Richard karapas the red jersey group was starting to close in Vancouver Avenue Paul was sustaining drives from others but he was keeping his eye on Enric Mass constantly neutralizing his efforts O'Connor was getting involved so was team and Aaron Smith meanwhile out front karapas was making sure of that polka dot Jersey and more than that starting to think about a stage win another one well the Gap was to close down to a remarkable 11 seconds to Richard karaphouse the red jersey group couldn't decide on a coordinated attack none of them were prepared to work for the others it was the same deal up front the Gita coming over to karapas they argued Miguel Anga Lopez went on the attack from the main group on the sad sight was of course Rodriguez Spanish Champion struggling I wasn't alone either on the day karapas hitting out a modest margin indeed and once he'd reached the plateau yet more mountain points had gone his way but the possibilities were well it seemed outstanding but maybe endless man set off in Hot Pursuit shouldering every single one of the corners trimming off the Apex could he possibly catch Richard karapas well under the flam Rouge it was going to be karapas for ineas grenadias three stage wins it would be for him and that polka dot Jersey an emphatic display from a man who started off as team principal and had to seed that role at the beginning of the race Delight for him and a big push as well from aaronsman knowing that there was other places up for grabs he sprinted home threw the bike to the line and behind him it was a question of retrieval ayuzo secure in third place Eva napole knowing he had won overall karapas with three wins in a polka dot Jersey and Rodriguez dropping down the order the tears flowed forever Nepal the congratulations sporting the offered up of course by Carlos Rodriguez who must have been disappointed this is how the day finished caropal is taking a head of Aaron Smith the brave margin only eight seconds at the line I use our hindley Mass evanapol menkes Lopez Almeida the tears and the emotions just poured out of our champion he will of course be crowned in Madrid but Remco Evan Paul has done it for himself which country and of course his team Evan Paul wins love Welter by imagine of two minutes and five barring any mishaps tomorrow into Madrid Rodriguez falling to Seventh Place Almeida fifth aaronsman up to six by a margin of just one second at the end karapas raised his arms today he will do again when he takes that polka dot Jersey finally in Madrid where all jerseys are awarded um will of course be in red amazing battles it raged the entire day and we've got more fighting for the sprinters tomorrow it may be something of a parade for those who have battled out for all of the jerseys but there is a Sprint stage to be won no mountains points on offer and no changes in the overall but you can be certain that this Welter will never disappoint even to the very last as we head to Madrid
